steps.title: Separate clauses before however
steps.content: The sentence has one independent clause about retroflex consonants being rare and a second independent clause about Mandarin. When however connects independent clauses, the first clause needs a semicolon before the contrast.

steps.title: Choose the semicolon boundary
steps.content: Choice A adds an unnecessary and, Choice C fuses the clauses without punctuation, and Choice D creates a comma splice. The remaining choice supplies the semicolon before however. The answer is B.
